sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_rand_table (id UInt32, random_value UInt32 DEFAULT rand());
SELECT id, random_value FROM test_rand_table WHERE random_value != rand() AND random_value != 0;
SELECT id, random_value FROM test_rand_table WHERE random_value != (SELECT rand() FROM test_rand_table) AND random_value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT AVG(random_value) AS avg_value FROM (SELECT id, random_value FROM test_rand_table WHERE random_value != rand()) GROUP BY id HAVING avg_value != rand();
SELECT id, random_value, CASE WHEN random_value != 0 THEN 'Not Zero' ELSE 'Zero' END AS zero_check FROM test_rand_table ORDER BY random_value;
SELECT rand() AS random_a, rand() AS random_b FROM test_rand_table WHERE random_a != random_b;
CREATE TABLE test_null_case (id UInt32, nullable_value Nullable(UInt32));
INSERT INTO test_null_case (id, nullable_value) VALUES (1, NULL), (2, 10), (3, NULL), (4, 20);
SELECT id FROM test_null_case WHERE nullable_value IS NULL OR rand() != 0;
WITH (SELECT rand() AS random_check) AS rand_cte SELECT id FROM test_null_case WHERE nullable_value != random_check;
